data: {"generalSituation":"A broad trough of low pressure will bring showers and thunderstorms to Guangdong in the next couple of days. With the trough of low pressure weakening and the subtropical ridge gradually covering the coast of Guangdong, showers will ease off gradually and the weather will become fine and very hot over the region in the middle and latter parts of this week. An area of low pressure may develop gradually to the seas east of the Philippines midweek this week. However, there are uncertainties in its subsequent movement and intensity. It will have a higher chance of entering the central and northern parts of the South China Sea in the latter part of this week, moving in the general direction of the vicinity of the coast of western Guangdong.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260720","week":"Monday","forecastWind":"Southwest force 4.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with occasional showers and thunderstorms.
